categories: Productos sin gluten, Arroces de grano largo, Arroces blancos
creator: org-app-elcoco

ingredients.text: 3 cups rice not stewed 200g cooked ham
mix all the ingredients of the filling
dissolve the yeast in a little water add 2 tablespoons flour and let it foam
place the rest of the table on the table flour along with salt
in the center make a hole and dump the foam
go taken flour gradually until form a homogenous mass
leave rest in a bowl cubiert n ur haste ue co from a coc hard co ingre rentemente aindicated in servar in pio and dry
enharinar ia dump the dough and stretch with pa kneading leaving the dough of 1 cm thickness
arrange the rotolo on a plate suitable for oven bound with oil spiraling
bring oven preheated to 180 degrees and to 19 98474

ingredients_text:
3 cups rice not stewed
200g cooked ham, 200g
shredded mozzarella, 1 cup dk
cooked peas, 1 red aji itches
sautéed, 1 purple onion, chopped
sautéed, 500g flour, salt, 2
tablespoons of oil, 250 cc of
water, 25 g of yeast,
preparation:
,quot,mix all the ingredients of the
filling, minus the ham and reserve,
for the dough, dissolve the yeast in
a little water add 2 tablespoons
flour and let it foam,
place the rest of the table on the table
flour along with salt, in the center
make a hole and dump the foam,
oil and the rest of the aqua, go
taken flour gradually until
form a homogenous mass, leave
rest in a bowl cubiert n ur
haste ue
co
from a
coc
hard
co
ingre
rentemente
aindicated in
servar in
pio and dry,
cccio
co
micro
3
canvas
volume, enharinar ia
dump the dough and stretch with pa
kneading leaving the dough of 1 cm
thickness, cover with fetas of
ham, spread the filling and roll,
arrange the rotolo on a plate
suitable for oven bound with oil
spiraling, leave
rest for 20 minutes, bring
oven preheated to 180 degrees and
to
19
98474

ingredients_text_es_ocr_1598374171:
Ingredientes:
3 tazas de arroz No se pasa cocido
200 g de jamon cocido, 200 g de
mozzarella rallada, 1 taza dk
arvejas cocidas, 1 aji rojo picade
salteado, 1 cebolla morada picada
salteada, 500 g de harina, Sal, 2
cucharadas de aceite, 250 cc de
agua, 25 g de levadura.
Preparacion:
"Mezclar todos los ingredientes del
relleno, menos el jamon y reservar.
Para la masa, disolver la levadura en
un poco de agua agregar 2 cuchara-
das de harina y dejar espumar.
Colocar sobre ia mesada el resto de
harina junto con la sal, en el centro
hacer un hueco y volcar la espuma,
el aceite y el resto del aqua, ir
tomado harina poco a poco hasta
formar una masa homogenea, dejar
reposar en un bol cubiert n ur
haste ue
Co
de A
Coc
dura
Co
ingre
RENTEMENTE
AINDICADA EN
SERVAR EN
PIO Y SECO.
Cccio
Co
micro
3
lienzo
volumen. Enharinar ia
volcar la masa y estirar con pa
amasar dejando la masa de 1 cm
espesor. Cubrir con las fetas de
jamon, esparcir el relleno y enrollar.
Disponer el rotolo sobre una placa
apta para horno untada con aceite
dando forma de espiral. Dejar
reposar por 20 minutos, llevar a
horno precalentado a 180 grados y
al
19
98474
